title: 有馬記念の後に・芦毛の怪物、立つ

text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a true clash of the titans, yet
Oguri Cap manages to come out on top.

The crowd erupts into deafening cheers for her,
as she's the undisputed champion of her
generation.

"Thank you all for supporting me!" Though simple,
this single sentence teems with emotion.
